content.sentence: Anh ấy sẵn sàng ___ vì gia đình.

translation.en: He is willing to sacrifice for the family.

notes:
hi sinh = to sacrifice — to give up something important for someone or something else.

It’s a verb. You usually sacrifice time, money, comfort, personal interests, even your life for a person, family, goal, or country. It often sounds serious and emotional, not small everyday trade-offs.

Strong memory link: opposite idea is ích kỷ (selfish).  
Spelling note: you’ll also see hy sinh — same meaning, just a different spelling.
exampleSentencesTranslated: Mom had to sacrifice a lot to raise me.
He is willing to sacrifice his time for his family.
She sacrifices her personal hobbies to care for her young child.
notes_md:
**hi sinh** = to sacrifice — to give up something important for someone or something else.

It’s a verb. You usually sacrifice **time, money, comfort, personal interests, even your life** for a person, family, goal, or country. It often sounds serious and emotional, not small everyday trade-offs.


Strong memory link: opposite idea is **ích kỷ** (selfish).  
Spelling note: you’ll also see **hy sinh** — same meaning, just a different spelling.

translation.en: She has sacrificed to help others.

content.sentence: Cô ấy đã ___ để giúp đỡ người khác.

example.es: Muchas personas han sacrificado por la libertad.
example.vi: Nhiều người đã hi sinh vì tự do.
example.en: Many people have sacrificed for freedom.

definitions.en: To give up something valuable for the sake of something else.
definitions.vi: Từ bỏ một cái gì đó quý giá vì lợi ích của cái khác.
definitions.es: Renunciar a algo valioso por el bien de otra cosa.

exampleSentences: Mẹ đã phải hi sinh rất nhiều để nuôi em lớn lên.
Anh sẵn sàng hi sinh thời gian của mình cho gia đình.
Chị ấy hi sinh sở thích cá nhân để chăm sóc con nhỏ.
